Assign metrics to process groups

Source: R/process-groups.R
assign_process_groups.Rd

Matches raster layer names or character metric names to the metric catalog.

Usage

assign_process_groups(
  x,
  catalog = metric_catalog(),
  groups = NULL,
  unmatched = "unassigned"
)

Arguments

x

A terra::SpatRaster, character vector, or data frame with metric columns.

catalog

Optional catalog table. Defaults to metric_catalog().

groups

Optional named character vector mapping metric names to process groups. Supplied mappings override catalog matches for those metrics.

unmatched

Character value assigned to unmatched metrics.

Value

A tibble with one row per supplied metric.

Details

Matching uses standardized lower-case metric names. Unmatched metrics are returned with process_group = unmatched so users can inspect custom layers.

See also

metric_catalog(), summarize_process_groups()

Examples

terrain <- derive_terrain(read_bathy(blueterra_example("bathy")))
assign_process_groups(terrain)
#> # A tibble: 13 × 7
#>    metric        metric_standard label process_group description source_function
#>    <chr>         <chr>           <chr> <chr>         <chr>       <chr>          
#>  1 bathy         bathy           Bath… base_bathyme… Input bath… as_bathy       
#>  2 slope_deg     slope_deg       Slope slope_gradie… Local slop… derive_slope   
#>  3 aspect_deg    aspect_deg      Aspe… orientation   Local down… derive_aspect  
#>  4 northness     northness       Nort… orientation   Cosine tra… derive_northne…
#>  5 eastness      eastness        East… orientation   Sine trans… derive_eastness
#>  6 hillshade     hillshade       Hill… surface_stru… Illuminati… derive_hillsha…
#>  7 roughness     roughness       Roug… seafloor_rug… Local rang… derive_roughne…
#>  8 tri           tri             Terr… seafloor_rug… Local terr… derive_tri     
#>  9 tpi           tpi             Topo… seafloor_pos… Cell posit… derive_tpi     
#> 10 bpi_3x3       bpi_3x3         Fine… seafloor_pos… Fine-scale… derive_bpi     
#> 11 bpi_11x11     bpi_11x11       Broa… seafloor_pos… Broad-scal… derive_bpi     
#> 12 curvature     curvature       Curv… curvature     Laplacian-… derive_curvatu…
#> 13 surface_area… surface_area_r… Surf… surface_stru… Approximat… derive_surface…
#> # ℹ 1 more variable: matched <lgl>
